news.t: Elm Market Navigator ETF Surpasses $500mm in AUM, Filling Gap in Multi-Trillion-Dollar Allocation Fund Category
Elm Wealth Launches Dynamic Index Investing® ETF with Industry-Leading Low Fee

overview.description: The Elm Market Navigator ETF (ELM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds with broad exposure to the global equity and fixed income markets. It combines the elements of passive and active investing in one basket. ELM was launched on Dec 31, 2011 and is issued by Elm.
